landing.heroDescription: Track notifications, issues, pull requests, and repositories from one focused workspace. Sign in with a GitHub token, GitHub OAuth, or whichever mode your deployment allows.
landing.authCardSubtitle: Use the authentication method currently available for this deployment.
landing.highlightFlexibleBody: Support a personal token, GitHub OAuth, or both without changing the dashboard experience.
landing.highlightUnifiedBody: Whichever entry path you use, GitPulse keeps the same session and GitHub data flow behind the scenes.
landing.highlightPrivateBody: Token-based access keeps authentication simple for self-hosted setups where you do not want to register an OAuth app.

auth.tokenHelp: Use a token with access to the GitHub data you want GitPulse to load.
auth.tokenHelpLink: Create or review tokens in GitHub settings.
auth.tokenInvalid: That GitHub token is invalid or no longer usable.
auth.tokenLoginFailed: Unable to sign in with this GitHub token right now.
auth.oauthUnavailable: GitHub OAuth is currently unavailable for this deployment.
auth.authFailed: GitHub OAuth sign-in failed. Please try again or use a GitHub token.
auth.providerStateUnavailable: Unable to load authentication options right now.
auth.personalModeSubtitle: Enter your password to access GitPulse

issueDetail.selectLockReason: Please select a reason for locking this issue:
issueDetail.lockReasonOffTopicDesc: The issue is not related to the repository's purpose
issueDetail.lockReasonTooHeatedDesc: The conversation has become too heated or unproductive
issueDetail.lockReasonResolvedDesc: The issue has been resolved and further discussion is unnecessary
issueDetail.lockReasonSpamDesc: The issue is spam or contains inappropriate content

filters.title: Filters
filters.empty: No filters available for this view.

notifications.tip: Unread items stay visible until GitHub marks them read. Use the filters above to compare unread and read work without changing state.

issues.tip: Open an issue to inspect its timeline, labels, and cross-references before deciding where to respond.

pulls.tip: Pull requests include review activity and commit context, so scan the detail view before switching to GitHub.

repos.tip: Repositories provide the starting point for recent project activity. Use GitHub for repository-level creation and settings.

commentComposer.previewEmpty: Preview will appear here once you start typing.
commentComposer.markdownHint: Markdown and GitHub-style issue references like #100 are supported.
commentComposer.emptyError: Please enter a comment before submitting.
commentComposer.unavailableError: Comments are temporarily unavailable for this item.

mermaid.title: Diagram viewer
mermaid.hint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom
